summary: Completed comprehensive testing of First Five Minutes onboarding experience. All 11 backend tests passed and all UI features verified via Playwright.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and flows verified

seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes endpoint which creates 4 assets, baselines, 1 verified outcome, and 3 priority actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: First Five Minutes demo fully tested. Key elements: Landing page with 'Start Demo' button (data-testid='start-demo-btn'), guided tour with 6 steps (Continue/Skip tour buttons), dashboard shows site-context, completed-loop (VFD Pump verified outcome), value-at-risk ($212.6/day with HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW breakdown), priority-actions (3 ranked items), continuous monitoring. Take Action button opens intervention modal with type select and description fields.
frontend_tests_passed: data-testid=start-demo-btn - Start Demo button visible and clickable
Guide overlay appears with 6 steps (Step 1 of 6 shown)
data-testid=guide-next-btn - Continue button advances through tour steps
Skip tour button closes the guide overlay
data-testid=site-context - Shows 'Riverside Plant - Building A' with 4 assets, 14 days baseline data, HVAC/Compressed Air/Process Cooling systems
data-testid=completed-loop - Shows VFD Coolant Pump with verified +1.3 kWh/hr savings at 91% confidence
data-testid=value-at-risk - Shows total $212.6/day with breakdown (HIGH $151, MEDIUM $43, LOW $19)
data-testid=action-0 - #1 HIGH Main Air Compressor 22% energy drift $151/day 89% confidence
data-testid=action-1 - #2 MEDIUM Air Handling Unit 1 12% efficiency drop $43/day 76% confidence
data-testid=action-2 - #3 LOW Process Chiller 1 8% energy drift $19/day 65% confidence
data-testid=take-action-0 - Take Action button visible on hover, opens intervention modal
data-testid=intervention-modal - Modal with Create Intervention title, recommended action, type select, description textarea
data-testid=intervention-description - Textarea for describing action taken
data-testid=submit-intervention - Submit button enabled after filling description
data-testid=continuous - Shows 'Continuous Monitoring Active' with 1 healthy, 3 in active state
data-testid=loop-status - Shows HEALTHY badge in header

features_verified.first_five_minutes_api: POST /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes creates complete demo with 4 assets, baselines, 1 verified outcome, 3 priorities (takes ~22 seconds)
features_verified.site_context: Shows 4 assets monitored, 14 days baseline data, 3 systems (HVAC, Compressed Air, Process Cooling)
features_verified.completed_loop: VFD Coolant Pump: 18.5% drift detected 3 days ago → Calibration → Verified +1.3 kWh/hr savings 91% confidence
features_verified.value_at_risk: Total $212.6/day with breakdown by band: HIGH $151 (Compressor), MEDIUM $43 (AHU), LOW $19 (Chiller)
features_verified.priority_actions: 3 ranked actions: #1 HIGH Compressor 22% drift $151/day 89% conf, #2 MEDIUM AHU 12% drop $43/day 76% conf, #3 LOW Chiller 8% drift $19/day 65% conf
features_verified.guided_tour: 6 steps: welcome, site, completed-loop, value-at-risk, actions, continuous - with Continue/Back/Skip tour navigation
features_verified.take_action_modal: Opens with recommended action, type select, description textarea, Cancel/Create Intervention buttons
features_verified.continuous_monitoring: Shows 1 healthy asset, 3 in active state, learning enabled
features_verified.loop_status: HEALTHY badge in header with green styling
